title: lantana glandulosissima var. grandis
intro: Lantana glandulosissima var. grandis, also known as Lantana, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America, and its medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves and flowers contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved respiratory health, and enhanced immune function. The leaves and flowers can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness their medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
